title: Department Manager Vacancy at Bikanervala Advisory Limited - 2026 Batch

jsonLd.title: Department Manager Vacancy at Bikanervala Advisory Limited - 2026 Batch
jsonLd.description:
Grow your career with Bikanervala Advisory Limited! We are hiring a Department Manager for our Lucknow team. Be part of a workplace that celebrates innovation, diversity, and performance.

About Bikanervala Advisory Limited:
Bikanervala Advisory Limited is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Monitor inventory levels and coordinate replenishment activities
• Train and motivate the sales team to deliver excellent service
• Assist in recruiting, onboarding, and performance management of staff
• Build relationships with regular customers to drive loyalty
• Conduct regular stock audits and prevent pilferage
• Handle customer queries, complaints, and escalations effectively
• Manage shrinkage and reduce stock discrepancies

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Bachelor's degree in a relevant field
• 1-3 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in SAP Retail
• Proficiency in Sales Techniques
• Proficiency in CRM
• Proficiency in Retail Operations
• Proficiency in Visual Merchandising
• Proficiency in Customer Service
• Proficiency in Planogram
• Proficiency in Omnichannel Retail

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Meal coupons and food allowance
• Learning & development budget
• Referral bonus program
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Flexible working hours
• Salary Range: 4 LPA - 9 LPA per annum

Location: Lucknow, Uttar Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Bikanervala Advisory Limited!

educationRequirements.credentialCategory: Bachelor's degree in a relevant field
